headline: Multilingual Media Executive | APAC Business Development & Marketing Strategy | Fluent in Chinese, English & French | Digital Transformation & Innovation Leader
summary:
Driving the Future of OOH in APAC | Trilingual Media Executive at Bravo Media

The Out-of-Home landscape is no longer just about static billboards; it is about immersive experiences, 3D creativity, and programmatic precision. As a media executive based in Hong Kong, I am passionate about bridging the gap between traditional advertising and the digital future of our cities.

At Bravo Media, I leverage my trilingual background (English, Chinese, French) to connect global brands with local audiences across the APAC region. My focus is on the convergence of technology and public space—from the giant 3D LED facades transforming Causeway Bay to data-driven transit campaigns that move with the consumer.

I believe that effective media requires a balance of bold creativity and rigorous analysis. Whether it is discussing the latest Programmatic DOOH trends or analyzing the impact of retail media networks, I am committed to pushing the boundaries of what outdoor advertising can achieve.

Core Competencies:

APAC Business Development
Programmatic DOOH & Digital Transformation
Strategic Partnerships & Brand Activation
Trilingual Negotiation (EN/CN/FR)

experiences.title: Managing Director
experiences.description:
Leading strategic business initiatives and market expansion across the APAC region, with a focus on:

• Developing and maintaining strategic partnerships with key industry stakeholders
• Driving digital transformation and innovation in media strategies
• Managing high-profile client relationships and project deliverables

experiences.title: Head of New Business & Customer Experience
experiences.description: Bravo Transport Services Limited is the holding company of Citybus & New World First Bus in Hong Kong.  We are committed to improving the quality of life for the public we serve and providing reliable bus services.

experiences.title: Head of Business Development and Marketing - Greater China
experiences.description:
We are a mission-critical SaaS solution for any business for whom site selection and physical location are determinants of success.

So how does that work? 
Retailers need to open new stores to grow. Finding great locations is the single most important predictor of store success. LocalGravity has unique proprietary data and tools that help retailers constantly and rapidly find the best locations. Leading blue chip companies are already relying on LocalGravity’s tools in China, the largest, most complex, market in the world. 

LocalGravity has, in 6 years, developed a high quality and the most extensive retail database that supports our retailers’ clients in China, Hong Kong, Taiwan, Macao and South East Asia.

Our database contains more than 1 million stores and 6,000 brands continuously indexed and quarterly updated for China alone for market intelligence and competitors review. We referenced more than 8,000 malls and department stores across China and solely created more than 7,000 key venue floor plan data and an elaborated ranking system for company to make quick and informed decisions on locations and data-driven target marketing strategy.

We created “real” traffic and demographics maps for more than 4,000 key venues in China for companies to review their existing stores locations and decide whether these locations are strategically located for their brands to capture the desired target audience.

experiences.title: General Manager North Asia
experiences.description:
1- Head of the North Asia region (China, Korea, Hong Kong). P&L on annual revenue US$22m (2019). Reported to global CEO in the Netherlands 
2- Established and led strategy for North Asia. Directly in charge of 4 regional sales teams (up to 9 direct reports and 30 employees) throughout North Asia region. Lead supporting functions (Marketing, Finance & Legal) for Asia region
3- Built key relationships with C-Level executives with MNC and SOEs in the grocery retail sector and successfully closed multi-millions deals with CRVanguard China, Carrefour China and AEON China.
4- Successfully launched the first worldwide Omni-channel loyalty program with HEMA (Alibaba new retail) in July 2019

experiences.title: Regional Business Director
experiences.description:
1- Head of Greater China region (China, Taiwan & Hong Kong). Built the Greater China region from scratch 2012 revenue was US$4m up to a staggering level of US$74m in 2016. Reported to MD APAC
2- Successfully re-designed the business strategy in Taiwan and re-organized teams to have achieved revenue growth from zero in 2012 to US$32 million in 2016 by developing the #1 grocery retailer, PXMART. Pioneered the first digital stamps loyalty solution in Taiwan (RTMART) as the first Asia regional showcase
3- Led China team and successfully re-engineered Eurocentric loyalty solutions to blend into the China-specific local solutions. Achieved revenue growth from US$3 million in 2012 to US$40 million in 2016.

experiences.title: Business Director (Airport Advertising Team)
experiences.description:
1- Led a team of 10 sales force and own the P&L responsibility of the department.
2- Created and initiated sales strategies, in charge of new media development, lead and guide operational marketing team, target and capture new opportunities in the markets such as luxury and China-related business.
3- Drove the elaboration of 5-Years 2012/13 to 2016/17 and led to the renewal of the advertising contract for Hong Kong Airport

experiences.title: Sales Director (Airport Advertising Team)
experiences.description:
1- Managed a sales team of 10 Account Managers and sales support team.
2- Responsible for setting the sales strategy and developing sales turnover for Shanghai Pudong Airport and Shanghai Hongqiao Airport.

education.description: CORe (Credential of Readiness) is a 150-hour certificate program on the fundamentals of business from Harvard Business School. CORe is comprised of three courses—Business Analytics, Economics for Managers, and Financial Accounting—developed by leading Harvard Business School faculty and delivered in an active learning environment based on the HBS signature case-based learning model.

education.degree_name: University Level Technical Diploma (DUT) Management in Organization and Management of Production
